installation_commands.all_required: npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk drizzle-orm drizzle-zod @neondatabase/serverless zod express express-session
installation_commands.frontend_only: npm install react react-dom @tanstack/react-query react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers wouter recharts lucide-react date-fns react-i18next i18next i18next-browser-languagedetector
installation_commands.ui_only: npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-select @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-toast @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-avatar @radix-ui/react-popover tailwindcss class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge
